project_type: Go Linux system utility - single static binary for K3OS boot
build_system: GoReleaser v2, go build with CGO_ENABLED=0 -tags static_build
test_framework: go test with stretchr/testify (assert, require, mock), table-driven tests preferred
build_command: GOOS=linux CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -ldflags "-s -w -extldflags -static" -tags static_build -o k3os .
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'go test ./...' (all tests pass). 2. Run 'GOOS=linux CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -o /dev/null .' (static build succeeds). 3. Run 'golangci-lint run ./...' (no lint errors).
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network - can install packages. Go 1.25.1 available via mise (project uses go 1.24). Linux sandbox so tests run directly. No root access for actual loop device testing - must use interface-based mocking.
contribution_requirements: Conventional commits required. golangci-lint v2 with gofumpt/goimports. TDD approach. Feature branches: feature/<task-id>-<short-slug>. Documentation must be kept in sync.
key_patterns: Interface-based DI for OS operations (see internal/iface/iface.go). Mocks via testify/mock in *_mock_test.go files. Linux-only build tags (//go:build linux). Error wrapping with fmt.Errorf + %w. Packages under internal/ are single-concern.
directory_structure: internal/enterchroot/ - chroot/pivot-root boot logic using loop devices. internal/iface/ - interfaces for OS operations. internal/iface/osimpl/ - real OS implementations. docs/ - project documentation. .kiro/steering/ - steering rules.
